nasb.text: Now Elisha the prophet called one of the sons of the prophets and said to him, “Gird up your loins, and take this flask of oil in your hand and go to Ramoth-gilead.

esv.text: Then Elisha the prophet called one of the sons of the prophets and said to him, “Tie up your garments, and take this flask of oil in your hand, and go to Ramoth-gilead.

cnv.text: 以利沙先知喚來一位先知門徒，對他說：“你要束上腰，手裡拿著這瓶膏油，到基列的拉末去。

ccb.text: 以利沙先知叫来一个先知，吩咐他：“你要束上腰带，拿着这瓶膏油去基列的拉末。
